title: AIDS/HIV Clinics - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > AIDS/HIV Clinics 6 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details FANNO CREEK CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, women's annual exams, STD screening and treatment, vaccinations, mental health evaluations, psychiatric services, counseling, and physical therapy. On-site clinical lab provides mammography, radiology, ultrasound, and echocardiography services. Focus on women’s health and HIV/AIDS patients. 2400 SW Vermont Street Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Ages 16 and older Hours: Clinic Hours Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Lab Hours Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:45pm
